script: [@console lp user %player_name% permission set minecraft.command.give true] [@command give %player_name% minecraft:player_head{display:{Name:'{"text":"<1. 请在聊天框输入中文名>","italic":false}'},SkullOwner:{Id:[I;<2. 请在聊天框输入玩家Id值>],Properties:{textures:[{Value:"<3. 请在聊天框输入Value值>"}]}}} 1 <-exac lp user %player_name% permission unset minecraft.command.give>] [@if %player_has_permission_server.licence.stock% == yes 啊哦，你没有获得进货许可证捏......]
